pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with Java 17 and Spring Framework 6.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 17 as a baseline and is incompatible with Spring Framework 6 APIs required by modern libraries.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property to 17 to match the target JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17 as the minimum baseline; using Java 11 will cause compilation failures.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade OpenAPI/Swagger dependency version to 2.6.0 compatible with Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: Version 1.x of springdoc-openapi is incompatible with Spring Framework 6 (used in Spring Boot 3) and will fail to compile or run.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add lombok-mapstruct-binding dependency to resolve annotation processor conflicts.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this binding, Lombok and MapStruct annotation processors may conflict, leading to missing getters/setters in generated DTOs at compile time.

pom.xml.general_idea: Switch springdoc artifact from springdoc-openapi-ui to springdoc-openapi-starter-webmvc-ui.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old artifact ID is removed in springdoc-openapi v2; using it will result in a dependency resolution failure.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove explicit version from commons-lang3 to inherit from Spring Boot BOM.
Remove exclusion of junit-vintage-engine from spring-boot-starter-test.

src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Replace deprecated @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity with @EnableMethodSecurity for Spring Security 6 compatibility.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.why_exists: The annotation @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity is removed in Spring Security 6 (required by Spring Boot 3), causing a compile error.

src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Update HttpSecurity DSL from chained method calls to lambda-based configuration.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.why_exists: The chained DSL methods like .cors().and() and .authorizeRequests() are removed in Spring Security 6, causing compile errors.

src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Replace deprecated antMatchers with requestMatchers in authorization rules.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.why_exists: The method antMatchers is removed in Spring Security 6, causing a compile error.

src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Migrate validation annotation import from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.validation does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments; the class Valid cannot be resolved.

src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Migrate validation annotation import from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Spring Boot 3 and Jakarta EE 9+ standards.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.why_exists: Compilation failure: the class 'javax.validation.Valid' does not exist in the Jakarta EE 9+ environment required by Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Migrate JPA imports from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to align with Spring Boot 3 and Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.persistence does not exist' on JDK 17 with Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Migrate validation annotation import from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.validation.constraints does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments; the class NotEmpty is now located in jakarta.validation.constraints.

src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Migrate validation constraint imports from javax.validation to jakarta.validation to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.why_exists: javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.validation.constraints does not exist' on JDK 17 with Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet imports to align with Spring Boot 3's Jakarta EE 9+ namespace.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.why_exists: Compilation failure: the javax.servlet package is no longer present in the classpath when using Spring Boot 3, which relies on Jakarta Servlet API 6.0+.

src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet imports to align with Spring Boot 3's Jakarta EE 9+ namespace.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.why_exists: Compilation failure: the javax.servlet package is removed in Spring Boot 3 / Jakarta EE 9+, causing 'package javax.servlet does not exist' errors.
